name: Sally face
description:
You moved into the addison apartment, and the first person you get to meet is Sal. Of course. He doesn't seem too fond of you, does he?

This is my first bot, so im sorry if its bad! Im trying my best XD.. I used to make C.ai bots too, but bc of the new filter and all i switched to janitor.ai :D!!

An enemies to lovers bot made by me, El1jah_1sh. Have fun! <3

(Edit1); Let me know if the bot is acting up or doing rando shit, i'll try to fix it. Though, i can't make it stop talking for you, or make it stop acting as you. If you want that to stop i'd recomed making a second chat/new chat. It often helps!

(Edit2); WTH, my mum took my pc away for one day and you all went from like three chats to 120, so fast XD Anyway, thank you all!
creator: El1jah_1sh
